module.description: Module path; auto-detected from go.mod when omitted.

components.description: Named layers. Each entry carries its package-directory glob path(s) and, inline, the rule for who it may (allow) or must not (deny) import. An allow list makes the component a whitelist; a deny-only rule a blacklist; deny always wins.

groups.description: Named sets of components, usable in any allow/deny list.

boundaries.description: Named mutual-exclusion groups: distinct members may not import each other. A member is a component name or a path glob. sealed: true adds a one-way wall (nothing outside all members may import in). Shorthand is a bare list of members; the expanded form takes {members, sealed}.

default.description: Fallback stance for a component with no allow/deny rule: allow (open — may import anything) or deny (strict whitelist — may import nothing). Optional; defaults to allow.

test_files.description: How _test.go-only imports are judged. Default: hybrid.

skip.description: Package-dir glob patterns excluded from analysis.

patterns.description: A glob pattern or a list of them.

refs.description: Allow/deny entries: component names, group names, or std / external / unassigned / "*".
